message:
✨ Fix 5 terminal issues: Powerline font, tmux info, attach, refresh restore, CLI chooser (#39)

1. Powerline font: Load MesloLGS NF as @font-face web font for xterm.js
   so Powerline/Nerd Font glyphs render correctly
2. Tmux info: Show 'tmux attach -t <session>' with copy button below tab bar
3. Attach blank screen: Unset TMUX env var when spawning grouped session
   to avoid nested tmux conflicts
4. Refresh restore: On page load, fetch GET /api/terminals and reconnect
   to existing PTYs instead of creating new ones
5. CLI chooser: If both copilot and claude are available, open a plain
   shell and let user pick from + menu instead of auto-launching copilot

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
